        // Client galleries swipe functionality
        function initClientGalleriesSwipe() {
            const carousel = document.getElementById('client-galleries-carousel');
            if (!carousel) return;

            let startX = 0;
            let startY = 0;
            let currentX = 0;
            let initialScrollLeft = 0;
            let isPointerDown = false;
            let hasMoved = false;
            let preventClicks = false;

            function handleStart(clientX, clientY) {
                isPointerDown = true;
                hasMoved = false;
                preventClicks = false;
                startX = clientX;
                startY = clientY;
                currentX = clientX;
                initialScrollLeft = carousel.scrollLeft;

                carousel.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
                carousel.style.scrollBehavior = 'auto'; // Disable smooth scroll during drag
            }

            function handleMove(clientX, clientY) {
                if (!isPointerDown) return;

                const deltaX = clientX - startX;
                const deltaY = Math.abs(clientY - startY);

                // Check if we should start dragging
                if (!hasMoved && (Math.abs(deltaX) > 5 || deltaY > 5)) {
                    hasMoved = true;
                }

                // If moving horizontally, update the scroll position in real-time
                if (hasMoved && Math.abs(deltaX) > deltaY) {
                    currentX = clientX;
                    const scrollDelta = startX - currentX;
                    carousel.scrollLeft = initialScrollLeft + scrollDelta;
                }
            }

            function handleEnd(clientX, clientY, event) {
                if (!isPointerDown) return;

                isPointerDown = false;
                carousel.style.cursor = 'grab';
                carousel.style.scrollBehavior = 'smooth'; // Re-enable smooth scroll

                if (!hasMoved) return; // Allow normal clicks/taps

                const deltaX = clientX - startX;
                const deltaY = Math.abs(clientY - startY);

                // If there was any significant movement, prevent click events
                if (hasMoved && Math.abs(deltaX) > 3) {
                    preventClicks = true;
                    event.preventDefault();
                    event.stopPropagation();

                    // Set a longer delay to prevent clicks after swipe
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        preventClicks = false;
                    }, 300);
                }

                // Add momentum for fast swipes
                const cardWidth = 320;
                const velocity = Math.abs(deltaX);

                if (velocity > 100) {
                    const momentumScroll = deltaX > 0 ? -cardWidth : cardWidth;
                    carousel.scrollBy({ left: momentumScroll, behavior: 'smooth' });
                }
            }

            // Mouse events
            carousel.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault(); // Prevent text selection
                handleStart(e.clientX, e.clientY);
            });

            document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                if (isPointerDown) {
                    e.preventDefault(); // Prevent text selection during drag
                }
                handleMove(e.clientX, e.clientY);
            });

            document.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => {
                handleEnd(e.clientX, e.clientY, e);
            });

            // Touch events
            carousel.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
                if (e.touches.length === 1) {
                    const touch = e.touches[0];
                    handleStart(touch.clientX, touch.clientY);
                }
            }, { passive: true });

            carousel.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
                if (e.touches.length === 1 && isPointerDown) {
                    const touch = e.touches[0];
                    const deltaX = Math.abs(touch.clientX - startX);
                    const deltaY = Math.abs(touch.clientY - startY);

                    // Prevent page scroll if moving horizontally
                    if (hasMoved && deltaX > deltaY) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                    }

                    handleMove(touch.clientX, touch.clientY);
                }
            }, { passive: false });

            carousel.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                if (e.changedTouches.length === 1) {
                    const touch = e.changedTouches[0];
                    handleEnd(touch.clientX, touch.clientY, e);
                }
            });

            // Intercept all clicks on the carousel to prevent clicks after swipe
            carousel.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (preventClicks) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    e.stopImmediatePropagation();
                }
            }, true); // Use capture phase to intercept before other handlers

            // Set cursor style and disable text selection
            carousel.style.cursor = 'grab';
            carousel.style.userSelect = 'none';
            carousel.style.scrollBehavior = 'smooth';
        }

        // Contract toggle functionality (for both signed and unsigned contracts)
        function initContractToggle() {
            const contractContainer = document.getElementById('contract-container');
            const contractHeader = document.getElementById('contract-header');

            if (contractHeader && contractContainer) {
                contractHeader.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    contractContainer.classList.toggle('expanded');
                });
            }
        }

        // Vendor gallery functionality
        
        // Media View handlers
        function initMediaViewHandlers(data) {
            const searchInput = document.getElementById('media-search-input');
            const typeFilter = document.getElementById('media-vendor-type-filter');
            const nameFilter = document.getElementById('media-vendor-name-filter');
            const mediaGrid = document.getElementById('media-grid');
            const popup = document.getElementById('vendor-detail-popup');
            const popupClose = document.getElementById('vendor-popup-close');

            if (!mediaGrid) return;

            const vendorsList = data.vendorsList || [];
            const vendorsMap = {};
            vendorsList.forEach(v => { vendorsMap[v.id] = v; });

            // Filter function
            function filterMedia() {
                const query = mediaViewSearchQuery.toLowerCase();
                const typeF = mediaViewVendorTypeFilter;
                const nameF = mediaViewVendorNameFilter;

                document.querySelectorAll('.media-item').forEach(item => {
                    const vendorIds = (item.dataset.vendors || '').split(',');
                    let matchesType = !typeF;
                    let matchesName = !nameF;
                    let matchesQuery = !query;

                    vendorIds.forEach(vId => {
                        const vendor = vendorsMap[vId];
                        if (vendor) {
                            if (typeF && vendor.type.toLowerCase() === typeF.toLowerCase()) matchesType = true;
                            if (nameF && vendor.name.toLowerCase() === nameF.toLowerCase()) matchesName = true;
                            if (query && vendor.name.toLowerCase().includes(query)) matchesQuery = true;
                        }
                    });

                    item.style.display = (matchesType && matchesName && matchesQuery) ? '' : 'none';
                });
            }

            // Search input handler
            if (searchInput) {
                searchInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    mediaViewSearchQuery = this.value;
                    filterMedia();
                });
            }

            // Type filter handler
            if (typeFilter) {
                typeFilter.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    mediaViewVendorTypeFilter = this.value;
                    filterMedia();
                });
            }

            // Name filter handler
            if (nameFilter) {
                nameFilter.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    mediaViewVendorNameFilter = this.value;
                    filterMedia();
                });
            }

            // Vendor tag click handlers
            document.querySelectorAll('.vendor-tag').forEach(tag => {
                tag.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    const vendorId = this.dataset.vendorId;
                    const vendorName = this.dataset.vendorName;
                    const vendorType = this.dataset.vendorType;
                    const vendorUrl = this.dataset.vendorUrl;

                    // Show popup
                    document.getElementById('vendor-popup-name').textContent = vendorName;
                    document.getElementById('vendor-popup-type').textContent = vendorType;
                    document.getElementById('vendor-popup-link').href = vendorUrl;
                    popup.classList.add('active');

                    // Fire CTA
                    window.myop_cta_handler('media-vendor-clicked', {
                        vendorId: vendorId,
                        vendorName: vendorName,
                        wwwUrl: vendorUrl
                    });
                });
            });

            // Close popup handlers
            if (popupClose) {
                popupClose.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    popup.classList.remove('active');
                });
            }

            if (popup) {
                popup.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    if (e.target === this) {
                        this.classList.remove('active');
                    }
                });
            }

            // Media item click - open lightbox
            document.querySelectorAll('.media-item').forEach(item => {
                item.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    if (e.target.closest('.vendor-tag')) return;
                    
                    const mediaUrl = this.dataset.mediaUrl;
                    const vendorIds = (this.dataset.vendors || '').split(',').filter(Boolean);
                    const lightbox = document.getElementById('media-view-lightbox');
                    const mediaContainer = document.getElementById('media-lightbox-media');
                    const vendorsContainer = document.getElementById('media-lightbox-vendors');
                    
                    const isVideo = mediaUrl.match(/\.(mp4|webm|m3u8)$/i);
                    if (isVideo) {
                        mediaContainer.innerHTML = '<video src="' + mediaUrl + '" controls autoplay></video>';
                    } else {
                        mediaContainer.innerHTML = '<img src="' + mediaUrl + '" alt="Media">';
                    }
                    
                    let vendorsHTML = '';
                    vendorIds.forEach(vId => {
                        const vendor = vendorsMap[vId];
                        if (vendor) {
                            vendorsHTML += '<div class="media-sidebar-vendor">' +
                                '<div class="media-sidebar-vendor-name">' + vendor.name + '</div>' +
                                '<div class="media-sidebar-vendor-type">' + vendor.type + '</div>' +
                                '<a class="media-sidebar-vendor-link" href="' + vendor.wwwUrl + '" target="_blank">' +
                                    '<svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M19 19H5V5h7V3H5c-1.11 0-2 .9-2 2v14c0 1.1.89 2 2 2h14c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2v-7h-2v7zM14 3v2h3.59l-9.83 9.83 1.41 1.41L19 6.41V10h2V3h-7z"/></svg>' +
                                    'Visit Website</a></div>';
                        }
                    });
                    vendorsContainer.innerHTML = vendorsHTML || '<p style="color:#666">No vendors tagged</p>';
                    lightbox.classList.add('active');
                    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
                });
            });
            
            // Media lightbox close handlers - use event delegation
            function closeMediaViewLightbox() {
                const lb = document.getElementById('media-view-lightbox');
                if (lb) {
                    lb.classList.remove('active');
                    document.body.style.overflow = '';
                    const video = lb.querySelector('video');
                    if (video) video.pause();
                }
            }
            
            // Use document-level delegation for close button
            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (e.target.id === 'media-lightbox-close' || e.target.closest('#media-lightbox-close')) {
                    closeMediaViewLightbox();
                }
                // Click on backdrop
                if (e.target.id === 'media-view-lightbox') {
                    closeMediaViewLightbox();
                }
            });
            
            // ESC key to close
            document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
                if (e.key === 'Escape') closeMediaViewLightbox();
            });

            // Video hover play
            document.querySelectorAll('.media-item video').forEach(video => {
                const item = video.closest('.media-item');
                item.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => video.play());
                item.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { video.pause(); video.currentTime = 0; });
            });
        }

        function initVendorGalleries(data) {
            const vendors = data.recommendedVendors;
            if (!vendors || vendors.length === 0) return;

            vendors.forEach((vendor, vendorIndex) => {
                if (!vendor.media || vendor.media.length <= 1) return;

                const vendorCard = document.querySelector(`[data-vendor-id="${vendor.bcAId}"]`);
                if (!vendorCard) return;

                const imageElement = vendorCard.querySelector('.vendor-image');
                const dotsContainer = vendorCard.querySelector('.vendor-image-gallery');
                const dots = vendorCard.querySelectorAll('.vendor-gallery-dot');

                if (!imageElement || !dotsContainer || dots.length === 0) return;

                let currentImageIndex = 0;
                let startX = 0;
                let startY = 0;
                let isDragging = false;

                // Function to update image and dots
                function updateImage(index) {
                    if (index < 0 || index >= vendor.media.length) return;

                    currentImageIndex = index;
                    imageElement.src = vendor.media[currentImageIndex];

                    // Update dots
                    dots.forEach((dot, dotIndex) => {
                        dot.classList.toggle('active', dotIndex === currentImageIndex);
                    });
                }

                // Next image function
                function nextImage() {
                    const nextIndex = (currentImageIndex + 1) % vendor.media.length;
                    updateImage(nextIndex);
                }

                // Previous image function
                function prevImage() {
                    const prevIndex = currentImageIndex === 0 ? vendor.media.length - 1 : currentImageIndex - 1;
                    updateImage(prevIndex);
                }

                // Dot click handlers
                dots.forEach((dot, index) => {
                    dot.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        updateImage(index);
                    });
                });

                // Touch/Mouse events for swiping
                const imageContainer = vendorCard.querySelector('.vendor-image-container');

                // Mouse events
                imageContainer.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    isDragging = true;
                    startX = e.clientX;
                    startY = e.clientY;
                });

                imageContainer.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                    if (!isDragging) return;
                    e.preventDefault();
                });

                imageContainer.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => {
                    if (!isDragging) return;
                    isDragging = false;

                    const deltaX = e.clientX - startX;
                    const deltaY = Math.abs(e.clientY - startY);

                    // Only trigger if horizontal swipe is greater than vertical
                    if (Math.abs(deltaX) > 50 && deltaY < 100) {
                        if (deltaX > 0) {
                            prevImage(); // Swipe right = previous image
                        } else {
                            nextImage(); // Swipe left = next image
                        }
                    }
                });

                imageContainer.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                    isDragging = false;
                });

                // Touch events
                imageContainer.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
                    const touch = e.touches[0];
                    startX = touch.clientX;
                    startY = touch.clientY;
                }, { passive: true });

                imageContainer.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
                    if (e.changedTouches.length === 0) return;

                    const touch = e.changedTouches[0];
                    const deltaX = touch.clientX - startX;
                    const deltaY = Math.abs(touch.clientY - startY);

                    // Only trigger if horizontal swipe is greater than vertical
                    if (Math.abs(deltaX) > 50 && deltaY < 100) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        if (deltaX > 0) {
                            prevImage(); // Swipe right = previous image
                        } else {
                            nextImage(); // Swipe left = next image
                        }
                    }
                }, { passive: false });

                // Auto-advance images every 5 seconds (optional)
                let autoAdvanceInterval = setInterval(nextImage, 5000);

                // Pause auto-advance on hover
                vendorCard.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                    clearInterval(autoAdvanceInterval);
                });

                // Resume auto-advance on mouse leave
                vendorCard.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                    clearInterval(autoAdvanceInterval);
                    autoAdvanceInterval = setInterval(nextImage, 5000);
                });
            });
        }

        // Contract signature functionality
        let signatureCanvas = null;
        let signatureCtx = null;
        let isDrawing = false;
        let hasDrawnSignature = false;
        let currentSignatureMode = 'draw';

        function initContractSignature(data) {
            const contract = data.contract;
            if (!contract || contract.signatureDate) return; // Skip if no contract or already signed

            const contractContainer = document.getElementById('contract-container');
            const contractHeader = document.getElementById('contract-header');
            const canvas = document.getElementById('signature-canvas');
            const clearBtn = document.getElementById('signature-clear-btn');
            const submitBtn = document.getElementById('signature-submit-btn');
            const signatureTabs = document.querySelectorAll('.signature-tab');
            const typeInput = document.getElementById('signature-type-input');
            const typePreviewText = document.getElementById('signature-type-preview-text');

            // Signature tabs
            signatureTabs.forEach(tab => {
                tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    const tabType = this.dataset.tab;
                    currentSignatureMode = tabType;

                    signatureTabs.forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
                    this.classList.add('active');

                    const drawArea = document.getElementById('signature-draw-area');
                    const typeArea = document.getElementById('signature-type-area');

                    if (tabType === 'draw') {
                        drawArea.classList.add('active');
                        typeArea.classList.remove('active');
                    } else {
                        drawArea.classList.remove('active');
                        typeArea.classList.add('active');
                    }

                    updateSubmitButton();
                });
            });

            // Type input
            if (typeInput && typePreviewText) {
                typeInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    typePreviewText.textContent = this.value || '';
                    updateSubmitButton();
                });
            }

            // Canvas setup
            if (canvas) {
                signatureCanvas = canvas;
                signatureCtx = canvas.getContext('2d');

                // Set canvas size to match display size
                const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
                canvas.width = rect.width;
                canvas.height = rect.height;

                signatureCtx.strokeStyle = '#000';
                signatureCtx.lineWidth = 2;
                signatureCtx.lineCap = 'round';
                signatureCtx.lineJoin = 'round';

                // Mouse events
                canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrawing);
                canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', draw);
                canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', stopDrawing);
                canvas.addEventListener('mouseout', stopDrawing);

                // Touch events for mobile
                canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const touch = e.touches[0];
                    const mouseEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', {
                        clientX: touch.clientX,
                        clientY: touch.clientY
                    });
                    startDrawing(mouseEvent);
                });

                canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const touch = e.touches[0];
                    const mouseEvent = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {
                        clientX: touch.clientX,
                        clientY: touch.clientY
                    });
                    draw(mouseEvent);
                });

                canvas.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    stopDrawing();
                });
            }

            // Clear button
            if (clearBtn) {
                clearBtn.addEventListener('click', clearSignature);
            }

            // Submit button
            if (submitBtn) {
                submitBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    submitSignature(data);
                });
            }

            updateSubmitButton();
        }

        function startDrawing(e) {
            isDrawing = true;
            const rect = signatureCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            signatureCtx.beginPath();
            signatureCtx.moveTo(e.clientX - rect.left, e.clientY - rect.top);
        }

        function draw(e) {
            if (!isDrawing) return;
            const rect = signatureCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            signatureCtx.lineTo(e.clientX - rect.left, e.clientY - rect.top);
            signatureCtx.stroke();
            hasDrawnSignature = true;
            const container = document.getElementById('signature-canvas-container');
            if (container) container.classList.add('has-signature');
            updateSubmitButton();
        }

        function stopDrawing() {
            isDrawing = false;
        }

        function clearSignature() {
            if (signatureCanvas && signatureCtx) {
                signatureCtx.clearRect(0, 0, signatureCanvas.width, signatureCanvas.height);
                hasDrawnSignature = false;
                const container = document.getElementById('signature-canvas-container');
                if (container) container.classList.remove('has-signature');
                updateSubmitButton();
            }
        }

        function updateSubmitButton() {
            const submitBtn = document.getElementById('signature-submit-btn');
            if (!submitBtn) return;

            let isValid = false;
            if (currentSignatureMode === 'draw') {
                isValid = hasDrawnSignature;
            } else {
                const typeInput = document.getElementById('signature-type-input');
                isValid = typeInput && typeInput.value.trim().length > 0;
            }

            submitBtn.disabled = !isValid;
        }

        function submitSignature(data) {
            let signatureUrl = '';

            if (currentSignatureMode === 'draw') {
                // Get drawn signature as base64
                signatureUrl = signatureCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');
            } else {
                // Generate signature from typed text
                const typeInput = document.getElementById('signature-type-input');
                const name = typeInput ? typeInput.value.trim() : '';
                if (!name) return;

                // Create a canvas to render the typed signature
                const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                tempCanvas.width = 400;
                tempCanvas.height = 100;
                const ctx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d');

                ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, tempCanvas.width, tempCanvas.height);

                ctx.fillStyle = '#000';
                ctx.font = '48px "Brush Script MT", "Segoe Script", cursive';
                ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
                ctx.fillText(name, tempCanvas.width / 2, tempCanvas.height / 2);

                signatureUrl = tempCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');
            }

            // Send CTA to host
            window.myop_cta_handler('contract_signature', { signatureUrl: signatureUrl });

            // Update UI to show signed state
            updateContractToSigned(data, signatureUrl);
        }

        function updateContractToSigned(data, signatureUrl) {
            const contractContainer = document.getElementById('contract-container');
            if (!contractContainer) return;

            // Update the status badge
            const badge = contractContainer.querySelector('.contract-status-badge');
            if (badge) {
                badge.classList.remove('pending');
                badge.classList.add('signed');
                badge.textContent = 'Signed';
            }

            // Replace signature section with signed display
            const signatureSection = contractContainer.querySelector('.signature-section');
            if (signatureSection) {
                const now = new Date();
                const signedDateStr = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
                    year: 'numeric',
                    month: 'long',
                    day: 'numeric'
                });
                const signerName = data.userName || 'Client';

                signatureSection.outerHTML = `
                    <div class="contract-signed-display">
                        <div class="signed-checkmark">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 16.17L4.83 12l-1.42 1.41L9 19 21 7l-1.41-1.41z"/></svg>
                        </div>
                        <div class="signed-title">Contract Signed</div>
                        <div class="signed-date">Signed on ${signedDateStr}</div>
                        <div class="signed-signature-container">
                            <img src="${signatureUrl}" alt="Signature">
                        </div>
                        <div class="signed-by">Signed by ${escapeHtml(signerName)}</div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }
        }

        // Hero carousel
        function startHeroCarousel(data) {
            if (heroInterval) {
                clearInterval(heroInterval);
            }

            const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-slide');
            if (slides.length <= 1) return;

            heroInterval = setInterval(() => {
                currentHeroSlide = (currentHeroSlide + 1) % slides.length;
                goToHeroSlide(currentHeroSlide);
            }, 5000);
        }

        function goToHeroSlide(index) {
            const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-slide');
            const indicators = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-indicator');

            slides.forEach((slide, i) => {
                slide.classList.toggle('active', i === index);
            });

            indicators.forEach((indicator, i) => {
                indicator.classList.toggle('active', i === index);
            });

            currentHeroSlide = index;
        }

        // Global close function for media lightbox
        window.closeMediaLightbox = function() {
            var lb = document.getElementById('media-view-lightbox');
            if (lb) {
                lb.classList.remove('active');
                document.body.style.overflow = '';
                var video = lb.querySelector('video');
                if (video) video.pause();
            }
        };

        // Public API
        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (!data) return currentState;

            // Check if only chats changed - do incremental update
            if (currentState && onlyChatsChanged(currentState, data)) {
                currentState = data;
                updateChats(data);
            } else {
                currentState = data;
                render(data);
            }
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            // Will be overridden by host application
            console.log('CTA:', action_id, payload);
        };

        // Capture contract as image and download
        window.captureContract = function() {
            var captureArea = document.getElementById('contract-capture-area');
            if (!captureArea) {
                alert('Contract not found');
                return;
            }

            // Use html2canvas library (loaded dynamically)
            if (typeof html2canvas === 'undefined') {
                var script = document.createElement('script');
                script.src = 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js';
                script.onload = function() {
                    performCapture(captureArea);
                };
                script.onerror = function() {
                    // Fallback: use print dialog
                    alert('Could not load image capture library. Using print dialog instead.');
                    window.print();
                };
                document.head.appendChild(script);
            } else {
                performCapture(captureArea);
            }
        };

        function performCapture(element) {
            // Show loading state
            var btn = document.querySelector('.contract-download-btn');
            var originalText = btn ? btn.innerHTML : '';
            if (btn) {
                btn.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="animation:spin 1s linear infinite"><path d="M12 4V1L8 5l4 4V6c3.31 0 6 2.69 6 6 0 1.01-.25 1.97-.7 2.8l1.46 1.46C19.54 15.03 20 13.57 20 12c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8zm0 14c-3.31 0-6-2.69-6-6 0-1.01.25-1.97.7-2.8L5.24 7.74C4.46 8.97 4 10.43 4 12c0 4.42 3.58 8 8 8v3l4-4-4-4v3z"/></svg> Capturing...';
                btn.disabled = true;
            }

            html2canvas(element, {
                backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
                scale: 2,
                useCORS: true,
                allowTaint: true,
                logging: false
            }).then(function(canvas) {
                // Create download link
                var link = document.createElement('a');
                link.download = 'contract-signed-' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + '.png';
                link.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                link.click();

                // Restore button
                if (btn) {
                    btn.innerHTML = originalText;
                    btn.disabled = false;
                }
            }).catch(function(err) {
                console.error('Capture failed:', err);
                alert('Failed to capture contract. Please try again or use your browser\'s screenshot feature.');
                if (btn) {
                    btn.innerHTML = originalText;
                    btn.disabled = false;
                }
            });
        }
    })();
    </script>
